title: [MTR] 200 Series Shinkansen
description: 200 Series Shinkansen addon for Minecraft Transit Railway.
body:
This addon for Minecraft Transit Railway adds the 200 Series Shinkansen to the game.

It includes cabs, standard cars, green cars, pantograph cars, diner cars and double decker cars.

There are five variants for the cab cars:
- V1 (oldest)
- V2 (rounded window)
- V3 (100 Series style window)
- V4 (similar as above but with two green lines + double deck cars available)
- Refurbished (blue and green pattern)

Since this train was operated by both JNR and JR East, it has two variants for most cars. You can assemble it as you wish.

Make sure to use FS (Forward Shroud) cars after pantograph ones.

## Please enjoy it!

**[Check out my other Shinkansen packs!](https://modrinth.com/collection/jzC7uozr)**

**[Check out the Dr Yellow variant of this train!](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/mtr-doctor-yellow-s2)**
